SEMI SPOILERS FOR 2.4

thats the bot idea LMAO

anyway the 2.4 update huh? it was uh... something (when jiaoqiu came on screen so did i) ANYWAY-

that being said PLEASE forgive me if i suddenly pump out like a million jiaoqiu bots i am trying to show my love for him in hopes he comes home because i had 20 pity and stupid gambling brain said "what's one ten pull?" and i got fucking houhou so now i have no pity and only 55 pulls when i had enough for soft/hard pity SO!! we're digging for scraps now guys

also if you want me to do a jiaoqiu heat bot please tell me (i will do it anyway but at least then i'll know yall want it)
